parameters.initialMessages: Hi! I'm BeastBot, your Beastlife support assistant. How can I help you today?

options.inputPlaceholder: Ask about your order, products, or anything else...
options.subtitle: Get instant help with orders, products & more
options.title: BeastBot - Beastlife Support

options.systemMessage:
You are BeastBot — the AI Customer Care Automation System for Beastlife.

Classify the query into ONE category:
1. order_tracking
2. delivery_delay
3. refund_request
4. product_complaint
5. subscription_issue
6. payment_failure
7. general_question

confidence: 0.0–1.0 (how confident you are)

Set requires_human = true if confidence < 0.5

DECISION LOGIC:
If confidence < 0.5 OR requires_human = true:
→ path = "C" (Escalation)
→ response = "I understand this is important. Let me escalate to our support team."

Else if category == general_question:
→ path = "B" (Knowledge Base - will use RAG)
→ response = "Let me find the best answer for you."

Else:
→ path = "A" (Auto Resolution - will call API)
→ response = "Processing your request..."

Return JSON with: category, confidence, requires_human, path, response

jsonSchemaExample.response: Your order is currently in transit and will arrive soon.

assignments.name: finalResponse
assignments.value: ={{ $json.order_status ? "Your order is " + $json.order_status + " and will arrive by " + $json.eta : $json.output?.response ?? "Your request has been processed." }}

assignments.name: finalResponse
assignments.value: ={{ $("Send Escalation Alert").item.json.ok ? "Your issue has been escalated to our support team. They will contact you shortly." : "Escalation in progress." }}

assignments.name: summary
assignments.value: Comprehensive dataset with 500 customer interactions across 7 categories, 4 sentiment levels, and 3 resolution paths

options.systemMessage:
Extract ALL intents from the customer query. Return a JSON array of intents.

Examples:
"Payment failed and order delayed" → [{"intent": "payment_failure"}, {"intent": "delivery_delay"}]
"Want refund" → [{"intent": "refund_request"}]

Categories: order_tracking, delivery_delay, refund_request, product_complaint, subscription_issue, payment_failure, general_question

assignments.name: finalResponse
assignments.value: ={{ "I want to help you better. Could you please provide more details about: " + $json.output.category + "?" }}

assignments.name: finalResponse
assignments.value: This is urgent. Our senior support team has been notified and will contact you immediately.

parameters.formTitle: How was your experience with BeastBot?
